title: hieracium orphnolepium
intro: Hieracium orphnolepium, also known as the hawkweed orphnolepium, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to China and the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium orphnolepium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
